  ✔ does NOT fire FLIGHT when no exit exists (0.1099ms)
  ✔ fires FIGHT when escape is blocked (0.1215ms)
  ✔ does NOT fire FIGHT when an exit exists and anger is not dominant (0.1805ms)
  ✔ fires FAWN under social threat + meaningful power imbalance (0.176ms)
  ✔ does NOT fire FAWN when the threat is not social (0.244ms)
  ✔ fires COLLAPSE under prolonged, maxed-out threat with no escape (0.1689ms)
  ✔ does NOT fire COLLAPSE when exposure has not yet been prolonged (0.1192ms)

  ✔ beliefPass does NOT fire DECEPTION_WITHOUT_CONSEQUENCE when lie discovery has consequence (1.4998ms)
  ✔ beliefPass detects BELIEF_REVERSAL_UNSUPPORTED when character mood flips without setup (1.9406ms)
  ✔ beliefPass does NOT fire BELIEF_REVERSAL_UNSUPPORTED when reversal is supported by prior clue (1.0465ms)
  ✔ beliefPass detects BELIEF_ISOLATION when scene plants clues but has no dialogue (1.1285ms)
  ✔ beliefPass does NOT fire BELIEF_ISOLATION when clue scene has dialogue (0.9838ms)

▶ Wave 175 — beliefPass: revelation clustering, belief stagnation, single-scene overload
  ✔ beliefPass detects REVELATION_CLUSTERING when 3 revelations land in a 3-scene window (3.8596ms)
  ✔ beliefPass does NOT fire REVELATION_CLUSTERING when revelations are spaced out (2.4438ms)
  ✔ beliefPass detects BELIEF_STAGNATION when no told belief is ever contradicted (1.1706ms)
  ✔ beliefPass does NOT fire BELIEF_STAGNATION when a told belief is later contradicted (0.8457ms)
  ✔ beliefPass detects SINGLE_SCENE_BELIEF_OVERLOAD when one scene packs 5+ assertions (0.566ms)
  ✔ beliefPass does NOT fire SINGLE_SCENE_BELIEF_OVERLOAD when assertions are spread thin (0.5032ms)
✔ Wave 175 — beliefPass: revelation clustering, belief stagnation, single-scene overload (9.7601ms)

  ✔ causalityPass does NOT fire ACTION_WITHOUT_CONSEQUENCE when the reaction lands in the SAME scene as the action (13.8109ms)
  ✔ causalityPass does NOT fire ACTION_WITHOUT_CONSEQUENCE when a revelation lands in the 2-scene wake (2.0943ms)
  ✔ causalityPass does NOT fire ACTION_WITHOUT_CONSEQUENCE when the wake chains forward into more action (1.2124ms)
  ✔ causalityPass does NOT fire ACTION_WITHOUT_CONSEQUENCE when the clue is paid off later, beyond the 2-scene wake (0.8232ms)
  ✔ causalityPass still fires ACTION_WITHOUT_CONSEQUENCE when the action is genuinely consequence-free (0.9086ms)
  ✔ causalityPass does NOT fire GOAL_WITHOUT_OPPOSITION for a quiet (exactly -1) reversal (1.2212ms)
  ✔ causalityPass still fires GOAL_WITHOUT_OPPOSITION when suspense only ever flattens to 0, never dips negative (0.838ms)
✔ D2-a — causalityPass: ACTION_WITHOUT_CONSEQUENCE / GOAL_WITHOUT_OPPOSITION guard fix (22.2018ms)

  ✔ characterArcPass does NOT fire ARC_EMOTIONAL_MONOTONE when register varies (2.6187ms)
  ✔ characterArcPass does NOT fire ARC_EMOTIONAL_MONOTONE when raw valence is monotone but conversational control shifts between characters (1.7417ms)
  ✔ characterArcPass still fires ARC_EMOTIONAL_MONOTONE when every movement channel is flat, not just emotionalShift (1.5223ms)
  ✔ characterArcPass detects CHARACTER_LATE_INTRODUCTION for major char past midpoint (9.5383ms)
  ✔ characterArcPass detects EMOTIONAL_WHIPLASH for rapid polarity alternation (0.9081ms)

▶ Wave 168 — characterArcPass: relational symmetry, arc resolution, secondary void
  ✔ characterArcPass detects RELATIONAL_SYMMETRY_ABSENT when all shifts are positive (0.9928ms)
  ✔ characterArcPass does NOT fire RELATIONAL_SYMMETRY_ABSENT when shifts go both directions (0.6909ms)

  ✔ characterArcPass does NOT fire ARC_RESOLUTION_ABSENT when Act 3 has a positive shift (0.7486ms)

  ✔ characterArcPass does NOT fire SECONDARY_CHARACTER_VOID when secondaries have relationship arcs (0.6543ms)
✔ Wave 168 — characterArcPass: relational symmetry, arc resolution, secondary void (5.2214ms)

▶ Wave 1186 — conflictPass (Program v2, Type 1 — signal channel): power-balance flatline, climax-uncontested, interrogation monopoly
  ✔ conflictPass fires CONFLICT_POWER_STATIC_FLATLINE when the same character holds every determined dyad scene (1.5472ms)
  ✔ conflictPass does NOT fire CONFLICT_POWER_STATIC_FLATLINE when control is held by more than one character (1.0003ms)
  ✔ conflictPass fires CONFLICT_CLIMAX_UNCONTESTED when the final zone never flips while an earlier zone does (0.8318ms)
  ✔ conflictPass does NOT fire CONFLICT_CLIMAX_UNCONTESTED when the final zone also flips at least once (0.8841ms)
  ✔ conflictPass fires CONFLICT_INTERROGATION_MONOPOLY when the same character controls every question-raising scene (0.9553ms)
  ✔ conflictPass does NOT fire CONFLICT_INTERROGATION_MONOPOLY when question-raising scenes split control between characters (0.7096ms)
✔ Wave 1186 — conflictPass (Program v2, Type 1 — signal channel): power-balance flatline, climax-uncontested, interrogation monopoly (6.3289ms)

  ✔ dialoguePass detects TALKING_HEADS for long dialogue run with no action beats (27.8211ms)
  ✔ dialoguePass does NOT fire TALKING_HEADS when action breaks dialogue (1.8319ms)

  ✔ dialoguePass detects DEADLOCK_DIALOGUE for circular argument with repeated keywords (1.1714ms)
✔ Wave 150 — dialoguePass: talking heads, over-parenthetical, deadlock (33.1364ms)
▶ Wave 164 — dialoguePass: rhetorical question flood, density inversion, voice uniformity
  ✔ dialoguePass detects RHETORICAL_QUESTION_FLOOD when speaker asks 3+ consecutive questions (1.0561ms)
  ✔ dialoguePass does NOT fire RHETORICAL_QUESTION_FLOOD when speaker mixes questions with declarations (0.9388ms)

▶ Wave 163 — originalityPass: act3 monotone, reaction overuse, emotional plateau
  ✔ originalityPass detects SCENE_PURPOSE_MONOTONE_ACT3 when all Act 3 scenes same purpose (3.9884ms)
  ✔ originalityPass does NOT fire SCENE_PURPOSE_MONOTONE_ACT3 when Act 3 has varied purposes (1.3811ms)
  ✔ originalityPass detects REACTION_SHOT_OVERUSE when >30% of action lines are terse reactions (1.9303ms)
  ✔ originalityPass does NOT fire REACTION_SHOT_OVERUSE when action lines are specific (1.3111ms)
  ✔ originalityPass detects EMOTIONAL_ARC_PLATEAU when all scenes are emotionally neutral (1.2674ms)
  ✔ originalityPass does NOT fire EMOTIONAL_ARC_PLATEAU when at least one scene has emotional shift (1.0757ms)
  ✔ originalityPass does NOT fire EMOTIONAL_ARC_PLATEAU when every scene is neutral but two separate revelations surface (0.9764ms)
  ✔ originalityPass still fires EMOTIONAL_ARC_PLATEAU when every movement channel is flat, not just emotionalShift (1.0736ms)
✔ Wave 163 — originalityPass: act3 monotone, reaction overuse, emotional plateau (13.501ms)

  ✔ pacingPass does NOT fire PACING_PLATEAU when no 4-scene run is uniform (1.6674ms)
  ✔ pacingPass detects OPENING_SCENE_BLOAT when scene 0 is >2x average (1.0217ms)
  ✔ pacingPass does NOT fire OPENING_SCENE_BLOAT when opening is proportionate (0.5268ms)
  ✔ pacingPass detects SUSPENSE_LENGTH_DECOUPLING when page space is inverse to tension (1.6076ms)
  ✔ pacingPass does NOT fire SUSPENSE_LENGTH_DECOUPLING when high-tension scenes get more space (1.5101ms)
✔ Wave 172 — pacingPass: plateau, opening bloat, suspense/length decoupling (24.3464ms)
▶ Wave 189 — pacingPass: velocity drop, climax runway, resolution bloat
  ✔ pacingPass detects SCENE_VELOCITY_DROP when second half scenes are much longer (1.4907ms)
  ✔ pacingPass does NOT fire SCENE_VELOCITY_DROP when first half is longer (0.8861ms)

  ✔ pacingPass does NOT fire CLIMAX_RUNWAY_OVERLONG when a runway scene is short (1.021ms)

  ✔ pacingPass does NOT fire RESOLUTION_SCENE_BLOAT when the final scene is short (0.3661ms)
✔ Wave 189 — pacingPass: velocity drop, climax runway, resolution bloat (5.8478ms)

  ✔ rhythmPass does NOT fire OPENING_WORD_REPETITION when first words are varied (1.3764ms)

  ✔ themePass does NOT fire THEME_NO_DIALECTIC when a resonant scene has negative shift (1.6776ms)

  ✔ themePass does NOT fire THEME_FRONT_LOADED when theme is distributed evenly (1.5502ms)

▶ Wave 174 — themePass: opening silence, single-keyword reliance, climax silence
  ✔ themePass detects THEME_OPENING_SILENT when the first scenes lack theme language (4.3561ms)
  ✔ themePass does NOT fire THEME_OPENING_SILENT when the opening plants the theme (1.6264ms)
  ✔ themePass detects THEME_SINGLE_KEYWORD_RELIANCE when one keyword dominates (1.5589ms)
  ✔ themePass does NOT fire THEME_SINGLE_KEYWORD_RELIANCE when keywords are balanced (1.1519ms)
  ✔ themePass detects THEME_CLIMAX_SCENE_SILENT when the peak scene lacks theme language (1.128ms)
  ✔ themePass does NOT fire THEME_CLIMAX_SCENE_SILENT when the climax carries the theme (0.9112ms)
✔ Wave 174 — themePass: opening silence, single-keyword reliance, climax silence (11.1675ms)
▶ Wave 223 — themePass: silent stretch, poles never costaged, resonance emotionally inert
  ✔ themePass detects THEME_SILENT_STRETCH when a long consecutive run of theme-silent scenes exceeds the threshold (2.4633ms)
  ✔ themePass does NOT fire THEME_SILENT_STRETCH when theme-silent scenes are evenly distributed (1.5188ms)

  ✔ themePass does NOT fire THEME_RESONANCE_EMOTIONALLY_INERT when at least one resonant scene carries emotional stakes (0.6334ms)
✔ Wave 223 — themePass: silent stretch, poles never costaged, resonance emotionally inert (7.0092ms)

  ✔ voicePass does NOT fire ADVERB_CRUTCH when action verbs are strong and specific (0.5517ms)

  ✔ voicePass does NOT fire FILTER_WORD_OVERLOAD when images are presented directly (0.6687ms)
